title: drosera neesii var. sulphurea
intro: Drosera neesii var. sulphurea, also known as the yellow sundew, is a carnivorous plant that belongs to the Droseraceae family. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. Drosera neesii var. sulphurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
